title: Incorrect results with OR terms in the ON clause of a LEFT JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE y1(a INT, b VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE y2(x INT PRIMARY KEY, y FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM y1 LEFT JOIN y2 ON ((x=1 AND y=b) OR (x=2 AND y=b));
key_bug_features: OR terms in the ON clause of a LEFT JOIN
